title: Digital Fundraising Executive
description:
Company Overview

Glyph Community is a Singapore-registered IPC charity dedicated to supporting children from lower-income or vulnerable households, aged 5 to 12, through holistic weekend enrichment programs. Beyond fostering social, emotional, and intellectual growth through structured activities like arts, STEM, life skills, and wellness initiatives, Glyph Community now also focuses on uplifting the living standards of the families we serve.

Role Overview

We are hiring a Digital Fundraising Executive (Contract) to grow our online fundraising and donor engagement efforts starting January 2026. You will plan and manage digital campaigns, apply for fundraising grants, and support the charity in meeting its fundraising goals.

Roles and Responsibilities

  1. Plan and run digital fundraising campaigns on social media, crowdfunding sites, and email independently
  2. Write and design fundraising content to attract and retain donors
  3. Apply for relevant fundraising grants and assist in donor reporting
  4. Track and report campaign and donor data using Excel or other tools
  5. Support other fundraising or administrative tasks as assigned

Key Performance Indicators

  • Growth in total online donations and number of active donors
  • Number of campaigns and grant applications completed on time
  • Accuracy and timeliness of reporting and documentation
  • Exact metrics to be aligned on if shortlisted for interview

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field
  • Non-degree holders with relevant fundraising experience and demonstrated proficiencies will be considered
  • 1 to 3 years of experience in digital marketing, fundraising and/or content creation
  • Strong writing and communication skills
  • Proficient in design tools (Adobe PS / AI, Canva, Davinci Resolve, Capcut), social media tools (meta business suite), Microsoft Office (Words, Excel, PowerPoint) and CRM (HubSpot).
  • Organised, creative, and passionate about helping children and families

Application Process

As part of our selection process, shortlisted applicants are required to participate in a case study to assess their suitability for the role.

postedCompany.description:
Glyph Community is a Singapore-registered IPC charity dedicated to supporting children from lower-income or vulnerable households, aged 5 to 12, through holistic weekend enrichment programs. Beyond fostering social, emotional, and intellectual growth through structured activities like arts, STEM, life skills, and wellness initiatives, Glyph Community now also focuses on uplifting the living standards of the families we serve.

Through targeted interventions, such as providing essential household items, furniture, and appliances, we aim to create a stable and nurturing home environment, which is critical to children’s development and well-being. By addressing both educational enrichment and home stability, Glyph Community empowers children to thrive and families to build a foundation for long-term resilience.

Founded in 2017, Glyph Community operates centers in Marsiling and Boon Lay, serving over 2,000 children across Singapore. We are recognized as an Institution of a Public Character (IPC) and a full member of the National Council of Social Service (NCSS), enabling donors and partners to contribute with confidence. Our integrated approach positions Glyph Community as a pioneering charity bridging educational support with tangible family welfare, making measurable impact on both children’s growth and household well-being.
postedCompany.name: GLYPH COMMUNITY LIMITED
